headline: Is UBER's AV Push Reason Enough to Invest in the Stock Currently?
summary: Uber's AV partnerships, gross bookings strength and diversification support its long-term outlook, but debt, labor unrest and geopolitical woes remain risks.

headline: Uber Removes Two Leaders From AI Growth Unit
summary: Leadership transition reshapes Uber's AI data-labeling business as the company says the division is seeing strong momentum.

headline: Lucid Group (LCID) Is Up 28.7% After Deep Cost Cuts And Index Shift - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In late June 2026, Lucid Group announced an 18% reduction of its U.S. workforce, eliminated the second production shift at its AMP-1 factory, and removed the Chief Operating Officer role, aiming to streamline operations and cut about US$158 million in annual costs while incurring roughly US$32 million in severance and related charges. These moves, combined with Lucid’s reclassification into several Russell small-cap and growth indexes, highlight a company in transition as it realigns...

headline: The Pricing Crisis Clouding the AI Trade
summary: Tokens are the currency of the AI age, but no one can figure out what they’re ultimately worth. Customers are confused and Wall Street is puzzled.
